feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Sales Document Approval Workflow
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I created the sales document workflow configuration steps and it says on the creation of sales order "In Approval" status. But couldn't see any orders in My Inbox app for SAP S4HANA Public Cloud Edition.

Please throw some lights on what could be wrong.

Thanks!

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA SAP Fiori

entry.title: Differences between apps purchase order by account assignment and monitor purchase order items
entry.content:
Dear,

when we check the apps purchase order by account assignment and the app Monitor purchase order items we get different values in the columns Value still to be invoiced and Value to be invoiced. 

We would expect the values to be the same in both apps.

Attached you can find a list of purchase orders where the values are different. 

What causes these differences and how can we get the same values in both apps?

Thanks.

Best regards

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Need Help Identifying the Best Processing Instruction for clearing Incoming and Outgoing Payments
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I’m currently working on clearing both incoming and outgoing payments in SAP S/4HANA Cloud public edition, and I’m having trouble finding the right processing instruction to use in the Automated Processing Rules - For Bank Statements. I’ve reviewed the available documentation, but I still can’t identify the best option for my needs.

So far, I’ve tried using FIFO_BASIC, EXMA, 010,..., but neither has worked for my reconciliation process. I’m looking for a processing instruction that can help me reconcile payments efficiently, given the criteria I have for clearing journal entries.

Has anyone had a similar issue or can anyone suggest which processing instruction would be best suited for reconciling both incoming and outgoing payments?

Any insights or recommendations would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you,

entry.title: Production Order Settlement Error
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We want to settle production order costs in 8th period. However, we did not make a settlement in the 7th period (it was a mistake).

The system does not allow settlement in  8th period, we faced that error "Balance of order 700000 must be settled for the previous period 007 first"

The 7th period is closed. How can we pass this error? I want to settle only 8th period now, not 7.

 

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Navigation to URL in RAP
entry.content:
Hi Community,

 

We would like to have a navigation to an external URL in RAP list report. First option is obvious and it works properly: Use a column in list with annotation: type: #WITH_URL

But we would like to add some extra possibilities: Use some code to create several url's and launch them with only one click. In old ECC systems, we have cl_gui_frontend_services=>execute that easily solve this issue and we thought it would be great to use something similar inside a RAP Action. Unfortunately, that class is not supported in Public Cloud.

 

Is there any workaround to perform this navigation via code?

 

Thanks a lot,

Kr,

Agustín.

Agustín.

entry.title: What are the restrictions in sap screen personas ?
entry.content:
consuming CDS view inside sap screen personas script is possible or not ?

Then how to get a api data inside the sap personas script ?

Pls share any interesting facts and restrictions of the sap screen personas .

SAP Screen Personas

entry.title: #COE#BUMA filtered per plant but sent to all approvers in Teams and Responsibility app
entry.content:
Hello,

In Teams and Responsibility app, we setup filter per plant assignment in Responsibility Definition but we noticed that the filter is not working as expected and all of the approvers for each plants are notified. It sends workflow approvals to which have the same Team Functions.

Is there a way to filter per assignments on these types of attributes in teams and responsibility app for Purchase order transactions?

Regards!

entry.title: 手动创建计划订单，当某个组件在MRP4设置了后继料时，计划订单的组件清单中没有带出来后继物料。只有手动创建的计划订单会这样，MRP跑出来的计划订单是会带出后继物料。
entry.content:
手动创建计划订单，当某个组件在MRP4设置了后继料时，计划订单的组件清单中没有带出来后继物料。只有手动创建的计划订单会这样，MRP跑出来的计划订单是会带出后继物料。

为什么手动创建的计划订单会带不出来后继料？

 

MM03：

 

MD11：

MRP跑出来的计划订单组件清单：

entry.title: Material authorization group for QM in public cloud system
entry.content:
Hi, 

I wanted to customize the double signature option for inspection lot approval. However, the customization options are very limited, here is an image with comparison to on premise. How can I include the double authorization feature? It is very common that customers use this function, as it is also required for some ISO norms. I am looking forward to options to include this feature in the cloud system.

Best regards

Nina

entry.title: Business Partner Personnel number CDS view
entry.content:
Dears,

Please advise what CDS view can i use to extract Business Partner Personnel numbers together with Business Partner number and Name

 

Ekaterina

 

Ekaterina

entry.title: CDS View for field WBS Element Mapped to Billing Element
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like know if there is any CDS view that contains the field "wbs element ID" mapped to "Billing Element ID" in professional service.

Thanks,

Evans Aarons

entry.title: Creation of Additive Costs in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

I am looking at creating Additive Costs by selecting the option "Cost Comp Struc w/ Texts" in SAP Public cloud via the application " Create Additive costs"

Can you please guide me with the steps and the necessary configurations needed for this purpose.

The intention is to to achieve COGS Split via Additive costing since my client is not a manufacturing organization and hence no BOMs are used

Request your valuable inputs

Regards

entry.title: Set Kanban Container Status - Batch number
entry.content:
Hi SAP gurus,

we use Batch number in app Set Kanban Container Status. There are more possibilities how to add batch. It can be put manually / but we need to know batch number or we can scan it, or search it:

1. we want to scan batch number - our QR code format is SAPnumber_batch. How to define scanner for reading only batch ? For example: 123456_batch1 - we need to scan only batch1.

2. in search field for batch are displayed all batches for search material - how we can define that there are displayed only batches with stock quantity ?

Thanks for support 🙂

entry.title: print push integration (SAP_COM_0467)
entry.content:
Hi 

We are in the process of implementing external printing or OMS on S4 Public Cloud using SAP BTP print service, integration suite and CPM, but we are having an issue with the SAP_COM_0647 (Push integration) which seems to only trigger or send a notification to call a BTP integration suite endpoint when you open or refresh the Maintain Print queue app and not when there is a new queue item added. 

Regards

JP

entry.title: Saving Files in S/4HANA Cloud Public using ABAP
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm working on a migration project to S/4HANA Cloud Public that requires me to save files using ABAP. I'm refactoring code that utilizes function modules (like SO_DOCUMENT_INSERT_API1) and classes (like cl_binary_relation), but I understand these are not available in the ABAP Cloud environment.

Could anyone provide guidance on how to achieve file-saving functionality in S/4HANA Cloud Public?

Thanks

entry.title: Stock Transfer
entry.content:
{
    "PostingDate": "2024-09-25T00:00:00",
    "GoodsMovementCode": "?", // Transfer Posting
    "to_MaterialDocumentItem": [
    {
        "Plant": "GS00",
        "StorageLocation": "GS0B",
        "Material": "MPD241204BK24",
        "GoodsMovementType": "?",
        "QuantityInEntryUnit": "1",
        "IssuingOrReceivingPlant": "GS00",
        "IssuingOrReceivingStorageLoc": "GS0C"
    }
  ]
}

I want to transfer stock from Blocked Stock, Stock in Quality Inspection and Returns to Stock Transfer (Storage Location).
Which GoodsMovementCode and GoodsMovementType should I use to achieve this?

entry.title: Internal batch number not assigning while posting MIGO
entry.content:
we are unable to generate internal batch number assignment during MIGO transaction and number range has been setup in CBC.

Error message

Number range  not defined

Message no. 26023

Diagnosis

You have enter number range  for the document type, but this number
range is not defined for the number range object "document".

entry.title: MPN need to flow along with material number and MPN other requirement
entry.content:
Manufacture Part Number Requirement

Dear experts, 

Would appreciate if you can kindly help us with the following MPN requirement of my client.

Requirement of Client:

  • Client requires the MPN number in the material master. The same MPN should be reflected in all places where the Material number flows. For example, MPN should appear in BOM, stock reports, inventory reports etc.)

  • Make (manufacturer) field is required in material master and the same should flow in procurement process (for e.g.: PR, PO, GR, Service Entry sheets and invoices)
  • The explanation of client requirement is given below in 2 cases apart from the SAP best practice

SAP Best Practice

Case 1:

As per SAP best practice, manufacturer as a supplier which is like 18300080(Vendor Number)

 For e.g.: Croma, reliance digital, Amazon

Client requires the MPN numbers based on manufacturer (supplier)

For example, As per SAP:

SAP standard:

Mfr Part Number: Phone12345. (manufacturers or suppliers are, Croma, Reliance digital, Amazon etc..)

Client Requirement:

Mfr Part Number should be Phone 12345 as follows:

  1. In place of manufacturer, the supplier or vendor name should be replaced with manufacturer(Original Equipment Manufacturer-OEM) like Samsung, Nokia and Redmi etc.

SAP standard:

 

MPN

Phone12345

SUPPLIER

Manufacturer

1.CROMA

 

 

2.Reliance Digital

 

 

3.Amazon

 

 

4.Flipkart

 

 

 

 No provision in standard sap best practice

 

OEM

MAKER

1.Samsung

 

 

2.Nokia

 

 

3.Redmi

Client Requirement:

Case 1: As per client team, for supplier they are asking the additional Field as Make (Distributors)

Case 1: Normal scenario

 

 

MPN

Phone 12345

Manufacturer

1.Samsung

 

2.Nokia

 

3.Redmi

Distributor/supplier

1.CROMA

 

2.Reliance Digital

 

3.Amazon

 

4.Flipkart

Case 2 Rare case: MPN will be different, but supplier remains same, For e.g.: phone12345 – CROMA, Reliance, Amazon

Rare case

 

 

 Different MPN

MPN

 

MPN

Manufacturer

1.Samsung

Sphone12345

 

2.Nokia

NPHONE22243

 

3.Redmi

RPhone1624716

Distributor/supplier

1.CROMA

 

 

2.Reliance Digital

 

 

3.Amazon

 

 

4.Flipkart

entry.title: Reassign costs and revenues - new app without excel upload???
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I have just read that there is a new version of the ‘Reassign costs and revenues’ app (F2009 --> F2009A) and wanted to try it out straight away. I noticed that the ‘Upload Excel’ feature, which is very important for my customer, is not included in the new app, while the previous app is now marked as ‘old’ and will probably disappear soon. That can't be true, can it? Will this be added? What is the alternative way to reassign via Excel?

Thank you in advance for any hint.

Best regards

Rado

entry.title: Custom PDF attachment to JE via API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV - Conversion issue
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

We have a requirement to display and attach custom Adobe Form to Journal Entry. We have built custom Adobe form using Form Service by Adobe in BTP and created RAP application with custom action. We are using S4 HANA Public Cloud system.
 
To generate/render the PDF, we are using cl_fp_ads_util=>render_pdf which provide pdf stream data, and observed that we are getting data in Hexadecimal format.


Now, we want to attach this pdf to Journal Entry, so we are using API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV via http call. However, when we pass same pdf stream data to API, we are getting status as 200 (instead of 201 created). Since API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV accept the data in binary format (using set_binary method of http request ) we are facing challenges converting the hex data to binary and successfully attaching the file.

Could anyone guide us on how to resolve this?
Thank you in advance!!
